section.title: Step 1: Identify shared setup
section.p: Action: List setup repeated across tests.

section.title: Step 2: Pick scope
section.p: Action: Choose narrowest scope that covers the need.

section.title: Step 3: Write fixture
section.p: Action: Author @pytest.fixture(scope=...); use yield if cleanup needed.

section.title: Step 4: Compose dependencies
section.p: Action: Declare other fixtures as parameters.
